name: Grilled Summer Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 small zucchini, cut into half-inch slices
1 small yellow squash, cut into half-inch slices
1 medium onion, cut into half-inch slices
1 red, green, or yellow bell pepper, cut into 2-inch pieces
4 ounces fresh button or shiitake mushrooms, halved or whole
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all vegetables in a bowl.
2. Toss with Italian dressing or teriyaki sauce.
3. Marinate for 5-10 minutes.
4. Grill on a vegetable grill topper or in a fish basket over hot coals for 5-10 minutes.
5. Serve immediately.
